Annotation

Conclusion and Recommendations based on this report and previous findings known to us
The patient shows elevated creatinine, suggesting impaired renal function, and mildly decreased total CO₂, possibly indicating mild metabolic acidosis. Cholesterol is slightly elevated, which may increase cardiovascular risk. Low AST and globulin are noted but are of unclear clinical significance in isolation. Other parameters are within normal limits. Recommend clinical correlation and further evaluation of renal function.
